text:
The first space feels silent and anticipatory, as if something is about to happen or just ended. The geometry and muted colors lend a futuristic calm, but the emptiness stirs a slight sense of isolation within me.

In the second scene, vibrant colors and illuminated screens surround me with energy. The words on the display invite reflection on the relationship between humans and technology, performance and observation. I feel intellectually stimulated, yet still an outsider looking in, pondering the boundaries between participant and spectator in this evolving environment.
